title: Contact Psychology Direct
description: Get matched to the right expert. Enquiries answered within 24 hours. Legal Aid options available.

blocks.headline: Get Matched With the Right Expert
blocks.subtitle: One call or form. 24-hour response guaranteed. We'll gather your requirements and send matched expert CVs within 24 hours, with full quotes and timescales.

children.text: Need a psychologist or psychiatrist for court? We specialise in family law, criminal, civil, immigration, and employment cases. Include:
We'll respond within 24 hours with matched CVs and quotes.
Need an Educational Psychologist for EHCP, SEND support, or statutory evaluation? Tell us:
We'll match experienced EPs and provide quotes within 24 hours.
Have a question or feedback? Contact us directly. We'll respond within one business day.
Are you a psychologist or psychiatrist? Register your interest in joining our network. No obligation. No costs. Access regular referrals, fair fees, and professional support.

blocks.heading: Ready to Submit Your Enquiry?
blocks.bodyText: Scroll down to our form, or call us directly on 01306 879 975. We respond within 24 hours with matched expert CVs and quotes.

faqs.question: How long does it take to receive expert CVs?
faqs.answer: We provide 2–3 expert CVs with quotes within 24 hours of your enquiry. For urgent cases, we often respond faster. You get options quickly so you can decide and instruct.

faqs.question: What information do I need to provide in my enquiry?
faqs.answer: More detail helps us match better. At minimum: case type, expert type, location, deadline, and funding source. You can always add more in a follow-up conversation.

faqs.question: How much does an expert witness assessment cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary by case type, complexity, travel, and turnaround time. We provide full quotes upfront with every CV. We always work at Legal Aid rates for publicly funded cases. Use our Expert Witness Fee Calculator for an estimate.

faqs.question: Do your experts work at Legal Aid rates?
faqs.answer: Yes. All our psychologists and psychiatrists work at 100% Legal Aid Agency rates for publicly funded cases. We provide transparent fee schedules with every quote. No surprises.

faqs.question: How long does an assessment take?
faqs.answer: Typically 2–4 hours depending on complexity. Your Client Manager coordinates the appointment at a time that works for all parties.

faqs.question: How long will the report take?
faqs.answer: Standard turnaround is 4–6 weeks from the assessment date. Fast-track options are available for tighter deadlines. Timescales are agreed upfront and included in your quote.

faqs.question: Can you accommodate urgent or emergency cases?
faqs.answer: Yes. We have a fast-track process for urgent deadlines. Call us at 01306 879 975 and we'll do our best to meet your timeline.

faqs.question: What if I need an expert in a specific area or with specific experience?
faqs.answer: Tell us your requirements. We'll match accordingly. We have 1,000+ professionals across all specialisms and locations. We consider personality fit and language requirements.

faqs.question: What happens after I submit an enquiry?
faqs.answer: Our Client Management team will contact you by phone or email to discuss your requirements. We'll then match experts and send CVs with quotes. You have a few days to decide and instruct.

faqs.question: Can I speak directly with the expert before instructing?
faqs.answer: Your Client Manager is your primary point of contact. They handle all queries and administration. In rare cases where direct contact is appropriate, we can arrange it.

faqs.question: Do you offer volume discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes, for educational services and large-volume legal cases. Contact us to discuss your requirements.

faqs.question: I'm a psychologist or psychiatrist. How do I register?
faqs.answer: Use the Join Our Network tab above or visit our careers page. Registration is free. You just need to be HCPC/GMC registered and have a valid DBS.

blocks.heading: Ready to Get Started?
blocks.bodyText: One phone call or form. 24-hour response guaranteed. Expert options within hours.
